items.title: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
items.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the US opts for a "reckless military adventure" every time a "diplomatic solution is on the table".

items.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
items.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

items.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 法國專家看川習會：美國若放棄台灣 將嚴重衝擊亞洲盟友
items.summary: 美國總統川普即將與中國國家主席習近平會面，法國亞洲事務專家高德蒙撰文表示，川普曾指台灣國防開支不足，但美國若放棄台灣，對亞洲盟友造成的衝擊可能比撤出歐洲更嚴重。  川普將於本月14日、1...…

items.title: 曝川習會可能談到台灣議題 魯比歐：台海須保持穩定
items.summary: 美國國務卿魯比歐剛結束在義大利和梵蒂岡的訪問行程，他今天受訪表示，美國總統川普下週造訪北京與中國國家主席習近平進行峰會期間，很可能談到台灣議題。  魯比歐（Marco Rubio）稍早被...…

items.title: 北韓多少士兵陣亡俄烏戰爭？ BBC分析「紀念牆」估2300人
items.summary: 英國廣播公司根據平壤一座新紀念館的衛星影像及官方照片進行分析後，推估約有2300名北韓士兵在替俄羅斯對烏克蘭作戰期間陣亡。  英國廣播公司新聞網（BBC News）報導，南韓估計，在烏克...…
